headline: Charles Schwab Completes Acquisition of Forge Global
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, March 02, 2026--The Charles Schwab Corporation (Schwab) today announced that it has completed its acquisition of Forge Global Holdings, Inc. (Forge). Forge provides eligible investors with direct and indirect access to shares of pre-IPO companies through direct private share purchases, single company funds, and multicompany funds. The transaction brings together leaders in public markets and private marketplace transactions, and the combination positions Schwab to offer a best-i
